---
title: "{{< meta course.title >}}"
---

{{< meta course.title >}} is a generic, configurable teaching repository.

Use this landing page for syllabus links, teaching material, and the automatically generated session overview.

- [Syllabus](syllabus.qmd)
- [Teaching notes](teaching_notes.qmd)
- [Resources](resources.qmd)
- [Example slides](slides/session_01.qmd)

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from scripts.session_overview import markdown_table
print(markdown_table())
```
